transcript: Lock and load, boys! It's time to see what you're made of! Fire! Yeah! Yeah! What's this status beth the miller family and the hucks are in the pettibone plant and the priestly said eta 15 to 20 can you hold we'll do our best 20 minutes we're gonna have two minutes out here. We're staying as long as it takes. He's got the whole thing. They're flanking us. Don't let any of them get back here. There's too many. We can't cover them all. We're going to need more ammo real soon, Beth. Give me a sec, Hank. You go. I got this honey Could you job it's become a barber Contact! They just keep coming! Hold back! Fuck! Plenty of ammo! And my missiles are dry! Come with me! Yes! Alright Jake, go reload! We'll cover you! Alright, I'm on it! Hey! The Franklins and the Boa Guards are coming, but they ain't here yet. Some DBs are starting to slip through. The Auto Cannons are holding them back for now, but if you can't hold the swarm, they're... We'll hold them. Don't you worry. Shit! We're grabbing our ankles here, hey? What's taking Jake so long? Jake? Jake! Yeah, yeah, I'm still reloading. Corningor's built for precision, not speed. Jake, you there? Yeah, I'm here. Everything okay? The last truck's just pulled in. Grab the others and get your ass back here. You hear that, Hank? Everyone's in. Come on, let's go. Roger that, Jake. Now, time to get the hell out of here. These hogs won't quit! They're coming from everywhere! Jake, we're not gonna make it! Get Carnagor in gear and get out of here! But Hank! Save yourself, Jake! Get to the bunker! Well, Hank, been good been good knowing you. He's coming! Reload! I'll be right back! Come on! They call me crazy. Get that one coming! Jake, they're coming around you. Get out of there. Oh, God. Come on. I need more of that camera. Oh, shit. Come on, baby. Oh, no. Jake, hold on. We're coming. Yeah, I'm reading you, Hank, but I figure I'm reading you Hank But I figure I'm pretty much screwed I'm just gonna clear the field for you Better get some cover So just do me a favor Jake He's gonna do it Tell Helen Tell her I died real good okay
